title: origanum × applii subsp. majoricum
intro: Origanum × applii subsp. majoricum, also known as Sweet Italian Oregano, is a subspecies of hybrid oregano that is native to Europe and the Mediterranean region. It possesses antimicrobial, antifungal, and anti-inflammatory properties, making it a valuable plant in herbal medicine. The health benefits of Origanum × applii subsp. majoricum include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and support respiratory health. This plant can be prepared for consumption as a tea, oil, or dried herb, and is often used in traditional medicine and cooking.
